title: dysoxylum minutiflorum
intro: Dysoxylum minutiflorum, also known as the small-flowered Dysoxylum, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Meliaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains a compound called azadirachtin, a natural insecticide. The bark of Dysoxylum minutiflorum is also used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusion, decoction, and tincture, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, promoting overall well-being.
